verses.latin_vulgate: Propter Sion non tacebo,  et propter Jerusalem non quiescam,  donec egrediatur ut splendor justus ejus,  et salvator ejus ut lampas accendatur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְמַ֤עַן צִיּוֹן֙ לֹ֣א אֶחֱשֶׁ֔ה וּלְמַ֥עַן יְרוּשָׁלַ֖͏ִם לֹ֣א אֶשְׁק֑וֹט עַד־יֵצֵ֤א כַנֹּ֙גַהּ֙ צִדְקָ֔הּ וִישׁוּעָתָ֖הּ כְּלַפִּ֥יד יִבְעָֽר׃
verses.king_james: For Zion’s sake will I not hold my peace, and for Jerusalem’s sake I will not rest, until the righteousness thereof go forth as brightness, and the salvation thereof as a lamp that burneth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et videbunt gentes justum tuum,  et cuncti reges inclytum tuum ;  et vocabitur tibi nomen novum,  quod os Domini nominabit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְרָא֤וּ גוֹיִם֙ צִדְקֵ֔ךְ וְכׇל־מְלָכִ֖ים כְּבוֹדֵ֑ךְ וְקֹ֤רָא לָךְ֙ שֵׁ֣ם חָדָ֔שׁ אֲשֶׁ֛ר פִּ֥י יְהֹוָ֖ה יִקֳּבֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.king_james: And the Gentiles shall see thy righteousness, and all kings thy glory: and thou shalt be called by a new name, which the mouth of the Lord shall name.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et eris corona gloriæ in manu Domini,  et diadema regni in manu Dei tui.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיִ֛ית עֲטֶ֥רֶת תִּפְאֶ֖רֶת בְּיַד־יְהֹוָ֑ה (וצנוף) [וּצְנִ֥יף] מְלוּכָ֖ה בְּכַף־אֱלֹהָֽיִךְ׃
verses.king_james: Thou shalt also be a crown of glory in the hand of the Lord, and a royal diadem in the hand of thy God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non vocaberis ultra Derelicta,  et terra tua non vocabitur amplius Desolata ;  sed vocaberis, Voluntas mea in ea,  et terra tua Inhabitata,  quia complacuit Domino in te,  et terra tua inhabitabitur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹא־יֵאָמֵר֩ לָ֨ךְ ע֜וֹד עֲזוּבָ֗ה וּלְאַרְצֵךְ֙ לֹא־יֵאָמֵ֥ר עוֹד֙ שְׁמָמָ֔ה כִּ֣י לָ֗ךְ יִקָּרֵא֙ חֶפְצִי־בָ֔הּ וּלְאַרְצֵ֖ךְ בְּעוּלָ֑ה כִּֽי־חָפֵ֤ץ יְהֹוָה֙ בָּ֔ךְ וְאַרְצֵ֖ךְ תִּבָּעֵֽל׃
verses.king_james: Thou shalt no more be termed Forsaken; neither shall thy land any more be termed Desolate: but thou shalt be called Hephzi–bah, and thy land Beulah: for the Lord delighteth in thee, and thy land shall be married.

verses.latin_vulgate: Habitabit enim juvenis cum virgine,  et habitabunt in te filii tui ;  et gaudebit sponsus super sponsam,  et gaudebit super te Deus tuus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־יִבְעַ֤ל בָּחוּר֙ בְּתוּלָ֔ה יִבְעָל֖וּךְ בָּנָ֑יִךְ וּמְשׂ֤וֹשׂ חָתָן֙ עַל־כַּלָּ֔ה יָשִׂ֥ישׂ עָלַ֖יִךְ אֱלֹהָֽיִךְ׃
verses.king_james: For as a young man marrieth a virgin, so shall thy sons marry thee: and as the bridegroom rejoiceth over the bride, so shall thy God rejoice over thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Super muros tuos, Jerusalem, constitui custodes ;  tota die et tota nocte  in perpetuum non tacebunt.  Qui reminiscimini Domini, ne taceatis,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַל־חוֹמֹתַ֣יִךְ יְרוּשָׁלַ֗͏ִם הִפְקַ֙דְתִּי֙ שֹֽׁמְרִ֔ים כׇּל־הַיּ֧וֹם וְכׇל־הַלַּ֛יְלָה תָּמִ֖יד לֹ֣א יֶחֱשׁ֑וּ הַמַּזְכִּרִים֙ אֶת־יְהֹוָ֔ה אַל־דֳּמִ֖י לָכֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: I have set watchmen upon thy walls, O Jerusalem, which shall never hold their peace day nor night: ye that make mention of the Lord, keep not silence,

verses.latin_vulgate: et ne detis silentium ei,  donec stabiliat et donec ponat Jerusalem  laudem in terra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַֽל־תִּתְּנ֥וּ דֳמִ֖י ל֑וֹ עַד־יְכוֹנֵ֞ן וְעַד־יָשִׂ֧ים אֶת־יְרוּשָׁלַ֛͏ִם תְּהִלָּ֖ה בָּאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: And give him no rest, till he establish, and till he make Jerusalem a praise in the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Juravit Dominus in dextera sua,  et in brachio fortitudinis suæ :  Si dedero triticum tuum ultra  cibum inimicis tuis ;  et si biberint filii alieni vinum tuum  in quo laborasti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נִשְׁבַּ֧ע יְהֹוָ֛ה בִּימִינ֖וֹ וּבִזְר֣וֹעַ עֻזּ֑וֹ אִם־אֶתֵּן֩ אֶת־דְּגָנֵ֨ךְ ע֤וֹד מַֽאֲכָל֙ לְאֹ֣יְבַ֔יִךְ וְאִם־יִשְׁתּ֤וּ בְנֵֽי־נֵכָר֙ תִּֽירוֹשֵׁ֔ךְ אֲשֶׁ֥ר יָגַ֖עַתְּ בּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: The Lord hath sworn by his right hand, and by the arm of his strength, Surely I will no more give thy corn to be meat for thine enemies; and the sons of the stranger shall not drink thy wine, for the which thou hast laboured:

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia qui congregant illud, comedent,  et laudabunt Dominum ;  et qui comportant illud, bibent  in atriis sanctis meis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י מְאַסְפָיו֙ יֹאכְלֻ֔הוּ וְהִֽלְל֖וּ אֶת־יְהֹוָ֑ה וּמְקַבְּצָ֥יו יִשְׁתֻּ֖הוּ בְּחַצְר֥וֹת קׇדְשִֽׁי׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: But they that have gathered it shall eat it, and praise the Lord; and they that have brought it together shall drink it in the courts of my holiness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Transite, transite per portas,  præparate viam populo :  planum facite iter, eligite lapides,  et elevate signum ad populos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עִבְר֤וּ עִבְרוּ֙ בַּשְּׁעָרִ֔ים פַּנּ֖וּ דֶּ֣רֶךְ הָעָ֑ם סֹ֣לּוּ סֹ֤לּוּ הַֽמְסִלָּה֙ סַקְּל֣וּ מֵאֶ֔בֶן הָרִ֥ימוּ נֵ֖ס עַל־הָעַמִּֽים׃
verses.king_james: Go through, go through the gates; prepare ye the way of the people; cast up, cast up the highway; gather out the stones; lift up a standard for the people.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce Dominus auditum fecit  in extremis terræ :  Dicite filiæ Sion :  Ecce Salvator tuus venit ;  ecce merces ejus cum eo,  et opus ejus coram illo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִנֵּ֣ה יְהֹוָ֗ה הִשְׁמִ֙יעַ֙ אֶל־קְצֵ֣ה הָאָ֔רֶץ אִמְרוּ֙ לְבַת־צִיּ֔וֹן הִנֵּ֥ה יִשְׁעֵ֖ךְ בָּ֑א הִנֵּ֤ה שְׂכָרוֹ֙ אִתּ֔וֹ וּפְעֻלָּת֖וֹ לְפָנָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: Behold, the Lord hath proclaimed unto the end of the world, Say ye to the daughter of Zion, Behold, thy salvation cometh; behold, his reward is with him, and his work before him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et vocabunt eos, Populus sanctus,  redempti a Domino ;  tu autem vocaberis, Quæsita civitas,  et non Derelicta.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְקָרְא֥וּ לָהֶ֛ם עַם־הַקֹּ֖דֶשׁ גְּאוּלֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה וְלָךְ֙ יִקָּרֵ֣א דְרוּשָׁ֔ה עִ֖יר לֹ֥א נֶעֱזָֽבָה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And they shall call them, The holy people, The redeemed of the Lord: and thou shalt be called, Sought out, A city not forsaken.
